investigation_summary: Internal research established climate science by the 1970s; company then spent decades funding denial while questioning science publicly (journalism & litigation documents). State AG climate investigations; Valdez & pipeline spills; sued shareholder Arjuna over climate resolution (2024). Near-zero federal tax years; $6.1B+ subsidies per Good Jobs First. Massive lobbying; historically funded Heartland, ALEC, CEI. CDP Climate C.

profile.tax_summary: Effective federal rate often near zero or negative in high-credit years; offshore profit allocation (Netherlands, Singapore, Switzerland). Good Jobs First ~$6.1B documented US subsidies.
profile.legal_summary: Climate knowledge suppression documented by researchers & press; NY climate fraud case dismissed 2019; Massachusetts investigation ongoing. Exxon Valdez; Mayflower pipeline EPA settlement; refinery air pollution settlement. 2024 shareholder climate-resolution lawsuit vs Arjuna criticized as intimidation.
profile.labor_summary: Standard energy-sector practices; refinery exposure history including benzene; large contractor workforce.
profile.environmental_summary: Core business is fossil fuels. Methane emissions; Arctic offshore drilling; major plastic precursor production. Net-zero pledge for operated assets by 2050 excludes scope 3 (product combustion). CDP Climate C (2023).
profile.political_summary: ~$12.4M US lobbying (2023). Historic funding to climate-skeptic groups; API membership.
profile.product_health: Combustion drives air pollution and climate harm. Refinery benzene; PFAS-related chemical lines.
profile.executive_summary: Darren Woods CEO. Lee Raymond era tied to climate denial campaigns; Rex Tillerson later SecState. No personal corruption charges in this record.
